content: Gemini offers two free embedding models via the Gemini API: gemini-embedding-001 (text-only, 3072 dims default, MRL-truncatable to 1536 or 768, free of charge) and gemini-embedding-2 (multimodal text+image+audio+video+PDF, also free). Free tier rate limits are approximately 100 RPM and 1,000 RPD (project-level, not per-key; varies by account/region). Use langchain-google-genai GoogleGenerativeAIEmbeddings with model='models/gemini-embedding-001' or model='gemini-embedding-001'. For RAG with Supabase pgvector, use 768-dim output to balance storage and quality.
